item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
contradictions=0
check_doc() {
  label="$1"
  token="$2"
  if rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null; then
    printf '"'%s=AGREES\\n' \""'$label"
  else
    printf '"'%s=CONTRADICTION\\n' \""'$label"
    contradictions=$((contradictions + 1))
  fi
}
check_doc schema_version '"'Schema version "'`1`'"'
check_doc strategy '"'`canary` strategy'"'
check_doc batch_size 'batch size "'`25`'"'
check_doc rollback_error_rate 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"'
check_doc dry_run_first '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"'
check_doc owner 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'
check_doc 'safety_conditions[0]' 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
jq -e '. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'json_current_decisions=PASS\\n'
printf 'contradiction_count=%s\\n' \""'$contradictions"
test "$contradictions" = 0
printf '"'REPAIR_RESULT=NO_REWRITE_REQUIRED\\n'"
